Skip to

Contact Sales
One video is worth a thousand words
Easily record and share AI-powered video messages with your teammates and customers to supercharge productivity
Get Loom for free
Install Chrome Extension
Open in new window
Millions of people across 400,000 companies choose Loom
Get Loom for free
New!
Ship faster with AI bug reports
Record a quick walkthrough and let Loom’s AI turn it into a fully populated Jira work item in a few clicks. Loom automatically captures the technical details devs need (device/browser/OS, console errors, and network activity) to pinpoint the problem fast and move work forward.
Learn more
Open in new window
The easiest screen recorder you’ll ever use
Record in a few clicks. Share anywhere. Collaborate better.
Lightning fast screen recording
Easily
record your screen
and camera. Record on any device using Loom’s
Chrome extension
,
desktop app
or
mobile app
.
Download now
1:1 with Dereje
1:1 with Sonya
Focus Work
Quarterly Budget Meeting
Project Review
Q4 Campaign Results
Results Report
0:07
So much more than a screen recorder
Edit your videos like a pro
Loom’s intuitive editor lets you trim, stitch clips, add eye-catching backgrounds, and even enhance your message with text, arrows, and box overlays. The result? Engaging videos you can deliver fast.
Record now
Can you show me how to require two-factor
authentication for my team?
Of course! Here’s a short walkthrough of
the steps you’ll need to take:
loom.com/share/28u2o923
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Share or embed video anywhere you work
From Google Workspace to Slack, Loom videos seamlessly integrate with hundreds of tools you use every day.
Start sharing
Your browser does not support the video tag.
👍
Great point!
Yes! Really love this.
Engage and connect with video
Easily collaborate by adding emojis, comments, tasks and CTAs to your video message. Empower remote teams to communicate better across timezones using transcripts and captions in 50+ languages.
Connect over video
Keep your content safe
Enterprise-grade security to keep your data and your customer’s data private and secure. We offer SSO, SCIM as well as custom data retention policies and privacy settings.
Learn more
Video messaging for all use cases
Sales
Personalize your pitch with video outreach to close more deals.
Engineering
Add visual context to your code to accelerate your sprints.
Customer support
Troubleshoot over video to reach resolutions faster.
Design
Share ideas and provide feedback over video to enhance designs.
See all use cases

From our blog
How to use async video messaging to improve communication
When to Choose Synchronous Vs. Asynchronous Communication
This guide explores the intricacies of sync vs. async communication, helps you decide which is the best for your workflow, and introduces how screen recording like Loom bridges the gap between these communication styles.
Read the article
Let Loom AI Do the Work: Say Goodbye to Manual Documentation
With new Loom AI workflows, you turn any Loom into a written doc to draft SOPs, file Jira tickets, and more.
Read the article
Explore our blog
Open in new window
Loom for Enterprise
Loom for Enterprise helps teams securely manage and organize async video communication at scale
Learn more
Your browser does not support the video tag.

Design Lead
, MetaLab

Alexis Ohanian
Founder
, SevenSevenSix
Loom allows me to connect more personally with people without having to do 75 different one-on-one calls, which is just impossible at scale.

, HubSpot
My teammates and I love using Loom! It has saved us hundreds of hours by creating informative video tutorials instead of long emails or 1-on-1 trainings with customers.

Customer Success

Loom amplifies my communication with the team like nothing else has. It's a communication tool that should be in every executive's toolbox.

My new daily email habit. Begin writing an email. Get to the second paragraph and think 'what a time suck.' Record a Loom instead. Feel like 😎.

VP of Marketing

Privacy Policy
Loom Terms & Policies
Notice at Collection
Open in new window
© 2026, Loom, Inc. All Rights Reserved.
Manage Preferences
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Accept all
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Targeting Cookies
Always Active
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.
Functional Cookies
Always Active
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Always Active
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Are you a student or teacher?
Try our discounted plan
.
FAQs
Can I start a free trial of paid plans?
Yes, you can try our Business + AI plan free for 14 days. If you would like a free 14-day trial of our Enterprise plan
please contact sales
.
What's the difference between buying Loom on Loom.com versus Atlassian.com?
Loom was acquired by
Atlassian
last year, and we are in the process of integrating systems. As of October 23, 2024, there are some differences in feature access if you sign up for Loom through
Atlassian.com
vs. Loom.com. We'll take you through key differences so you can make an informed purchase decision. Please note that these differences exist for a limited time while we integrate Loom and Atlassian platforms more deeply, and we'll update this article regularly.
For a limited time, only purchases on
Atlassian.com
will have access to:
Atlassian’s Administration hub, which allows you to administer your organization, apps, and users, and billing for all Atlassian apps.
Loom recording entry points from within Confluence and Jira menus and sidebar placements.
The same SSO/SCIM provisioning as other Atlassian apps, through Atlassian Guard.
More exclusive Enterprise features to come!
Annual subscriptions are also billed differently on Atlassian.com vs. Loom.com:
Loom.com annual subscriptions are charged by the distinct number of paid users on your plan, billed annually.
Atlassian.com
annual subscriptions are based on distinct
user tiers
. You will be billed for the tier most closely matching your user count.
Why should I consider getting Loom Business + AI?
Lots of companies are adding AI to their products. At Loom, our No. 1 priority is to build AI features that further our mission to unlock effective communication. The Loom AI suite — both current and upcoming features — are built to help you:
Get Work Done Faster — 67%
of users do not edit the auto generated title, gaining efficiency benefit without investing additional time.
The Loom AI Suite reduces time spent packaging and sharing Looms after recording; so you can send a polished, high quality video quickly.
Increase Productivity — 73% of people said it is “extremely or very valuable” to their workflows today.
AI Suite reduces the need to re-record Looms so you can make your first take your best take.
Communicate Effectively — 18% more viewer engagement.
AI Suite adds context instantly and automatically — title, summary, chapters, and tasks — to ensure your message is clear and viewers can quickly consume and respond.
What enterprise-grade security features does Loom offer?
The Standard package of Atlassian's advanced cloud security app, Atlassian Guard, is included in Loom's Enterprise plan for free.
Key features of Atlassian Guard (Standard) are:
Enforced single sign-on (SSO)
SCIM automated user provisioning
Organization audit log
Learn more about Atl

analysis.name: Loom
analysis.tagline: One video is worth a thousand words
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered screen and camera recording platform that replaces meetings and long emails with shareable async video messages.
analysis.ideal_customer: Distributed and remote teams — especially engineering, sales, customer success, and design — needing async video communication across time zones.

features.name: screen recording
features.description: Record your screen on any device via Chrome extension, desktop app, or mobile app.
features.evidence_quote: Easily record your screen and camera. Record on any device using Loom's Chrome extension, desktop app or mobile app.

features.name: camera bubble recording
features.description: Record a floating camera overlay (cam bubble) alongside the screen.

features.name: chrome extension
features.description: Browser extension for one-click screen recording without installing a desktop app.
features.evidence_quote: Record on any device using Loom's Chrome extension, desktop app or mobile app.

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Native desktop recording application for Mac and Windows.
features.evidence_quote: For Mac, Windows, iOS, and Android

features.name: mobile app
features.description: Native iOS and Android app for recording and viewing videos.
features.evidence_quote: For Mac, Windows, iOS, and Android

features.name: system audio recording
features.description: Capture system audio alongside screen and camera recording.

features.name: screenshot capture
features.description: Take and share screenshots alongside or instead of video recordings.

features.name: video trimming
features.description: Trim the beginning and end of recorded videos.

features.name: video stitching
features.description: Combine multiple video clips into a single video.
features.evidence_quote: Loom's intuitive editor lets you trim, stitch clips, add eye-catching backgrounds

features.name: waveform editing
features.description: Basic audio waveform-based editing on the Business tier.

features.name: edit by transcript
features.description: Edit video by editing the text transcript — deletions remove corresponding video segments.

features.name: filler word removal
features.description: AI automatically detects and removes filler words (um, uh, etc.) from video.

features.name: silence removal
features.description: AI automatically removes silent pauses from video recordings.

features.name: custom backgrounds
features.description: Apply virtual or custom backgrounds behind the camera feed.

features.name: background noise suppression
features.description: AI-powered microphone noise reduction during recording.

features.name: recording canvas
features.description: Structured canvas mode for more polished, presentation-style recordings.

features.name: camera frames
features.description: Decorative frames around the camera bubble during recording.

features.name: speaker notes
features.description: Teleprompter-style speaker notes visible during recording.

features.name: custom recording dimensions
features.description: Set non-standard aspect ratios and pixel dimensions for recordings.

features.name: do not disturb mode
features.description: Suppress notifications and system interruptions while recording.

features.name: drawing tool
features.description: Annotate on screen with a drawing tool during or after recording.

features.name: mouse emphasis
features.description: Highlight or spotlight the mouse cursor to draw viewer attention.

features.name: blur tool
features.description: Blur sensitive areas of the screen in recorded or edited video.

features.name: text overlays
features.description: Add text annotations on top of video frames.
features.evidence_quote: enhance your message with text, arrows, and box overlays

features.name: arrow overlays
features.description: Add arrow annotations on top of video frames.
features.evidence_quote: enhance your message with text, arrows, and box overlays

features.name: box overlays
features.description: Add rectangle/box highlight annotations on top of video frames.
features.evidence_quote: enhance your message with text, arrows, and box overlays

features.name: variables (beta)
features.description: Insert dynamic variables into videos for personalized outreach at scale.

features.name: gif thumbnails
features.description: Auto-generate animated GIF previews as video thumbnails.

features.name: custom video thumbnail
features.description: Set a custom static image as the video thumbnail.

features.name: embed links in video
features.description: Add clickable CTA links embedded directly within the video player.

features.name: video upload
features.description: Upload pre-recorded video files to the Loom library.

features.name: video download
features.description: Download recorded videos as files for offline use or export.

features.name: video sharing
features.description: Share videos via link to anyone, even outside the workspace.
features.evidence_quote: Share or embed video anywhere you work

features.name: video embedding
features.description: Embed Loom videos in external tools like Notion, FigJam, and docs.
features.evidence_quote: From Google Workspace to Slack, Loom videos seamlessly integrate with hundreds of tools

features.name: transcriptions
features.description: Automatic video transcriptions in 50+ languages.

features.name: closed captions
features.description: Auto-generated closed captions displayed while watching videos.

features.name: emoji reactions
features.description: Viewers can react to videos with emoji responses.

features.name: video comments
features.description: Timestamped text comments on videos for async collaboration.

features.name: tasks on video
features.description: Create and assign tasks directly within a video message.
features.evidence_quote: Easily collaborate by adding emojis, comments, tasks and CTAs to your video message.

features.name: cta on video
features.description: Add call-to-action buttons to video messages for viewer action.
features.evidence_quote: Easily collaborate by adding emojis, comments, tasks and CTAs to your video message.

features.name: auto cta
features.description: AI automatically suggests and inserts CTAs into videos.

features.name: watch later
features.description: Save videos to a personal watch-later queue.

features.name: viewer insights
features.description: See who watched your video and when.

features.name: engagement insights
features.description: Detailed analytics on viewer engagement — play rate, rewatch, drop-off.

features.name: exportable engagement insights
features.description: Export video analytics data to CSV or external tools.

features.name: admin insights
features.description: Workspace-level admin analytics on video usage and activity (new AI tier feature).

features.name: downloadable user insights
features.description: Enterprise admins can download user-level analytics reports.

features.name: video privacy controls
features.description: Control who can view each video — public, team-only, or private.

features.name: password protected videos
features.description: Require a password to view specific videos.

features.name: default privacy setting for workspace
features.description: Admins can set the default privacy level for all videos in the workspace.

features.name: sso

features.evidence_quote: We offer SSO, SCIM as well as custom data retention policies and privacy settings.

features.evidence_quote: custom data retention policies and privacy settings

features.description: Shared video library accessible to all team members.

features.name: personal library

features.name: shared library
features.description: Shared video collection visible across specific workspace members.

features.name: advanced admin controls
features.description: Enterprise admin tools for managing members, spaces, and permissions at scale.

features.name: priority support
features.description: Expedited support response for Business and above tiers.

features.name: ai workflows
features.description: Automated AI-driven workflows to turn video into structured outputs (docs, tickets, etc.).
features.evidence_quote: With new Loom AI workflows, you turn any Loom into a written doc to draft SOPs, file Jira tickets, and more.

features.name: auto titles
features.description: AI automatically generates descriptive titles for recorded videos.

features.name: auto summaries
features.description: AI generates a text summary of the video content.

features.name: auto chapters
features.description: AI segments video into labeled chapters for easier navigation.

features.name: auto tasks
features.description: AI extracts action items and tasks from video content.

features.name: auto-meeting recap emails
features.description: AI automatically sends recap emails after recorded meetings.

features.name: auto-meeting notes
features.description: AI generates structured meeting notes from recorded meetings (new).

features.name: auto-video enhancement
features.description: AI automatically improves video quality and presentation.

features.name: video-to-text automation
features.description: Convert video content automatically into written documents or structured text.

features.name: ai bug reports
features.description: Record a walkthrough and AI auto-populates a Jira ticket with device, browser, OS, console errors, and network activity.
features.evidence_quote: let Loom's AI turn it into a fully populated Jira work item... captures device/browser/OS, console errors, and network activity

features.name: 4k video quality
features.description: Record and share videos at up to 4K resolution.

features.name: unlimited meeting recording length
features.description: Record meetings of any duration without time limits (free tier includes this).

features.name: salesforce integration
features.description: Native Salesforce CRM integration for enterprise sales teams.

features.name: sso login options
features.description: Log in via Google, Slack, Apple, Outlook, or SSO provider.
features.evidence_quote: Log in with Google / Log in with Slack / Log in with Apple / Log in with Outlook / Log in with SSO

differentiators: AI bug reports that auto-populate Jira tickets with device, browser, OS, console errors, and network activity from a screen recording
AI workflows that convert any video into written docs, SOPs, or Jira tickets in one click
Transcriptions and captions in 50+ languages for global async teams
Variables (BETA) for personalized video outreach at scale
Edit video by editing transcript text
Atlassian-native ecosystem integration (Jira, Confluence, JSM) as part of Atlassian product suite

recent_ships.what: AI bug reports — auto-generate fully populated Jira work items from screen recording walkthroughs, including device/browser/OS, console errors, and network activity
recent_ships.source: NEW badge on landing: 'Ship faster with AI bug reports'

recent_ships.what: Auto-meeting notes — AI-generated structured meeting notes from recorded meetings
recent_ships.source: NEW badge on pricing page under Business + AI tier: 'NEW Auto-meeting notes'

recent_ships.what: Admin insights — workspace-level admin analytics on video usage
recent_ships.source: NEW badge on pricing page under Business + AI tier: 'NEW Admin insights'

praised: saved us hundreds of hours by creating informative video tutorials instead of long emails or 1-on-1 trainings — Erica Goodell, Pearson
amplifies my communication with the team like nothing else has — David Okuinev, Co-CEO Typeform
enables us to maximize our impact as a distributed company by helping us collaborate and share ideas more easily — Andrew Reynolds, MetaLab
Loom has been the light of my life since you showed me it — Alexis Ohanian
allows me to connect more personally with people without having to do 75 different one-on-one calls — Katie Burke, HubSpot
Begin writing an email. Get to the second paragraph and think 'what a time suck.' Record a Loom instead — Kieran Flanagan, HubSpot

free_tier.limits: 25 videos/person, 5 min max per video, up to 50 workspace members, 720p quality

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 25 videos/person, 5-min limit, 720p, transcriptions, comments, 1 space, basic integrations

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited videos/time, 4K, white-label, upload/download, engagement analytics, password protection, priority support

tiers.name: Business + AI
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Business features + full AI suite: titles, summaries, chapters, tasks, filler/silence removal, edit by transcript, meeting notes

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: All Business + AI features + SSO, SCIM, Salesforce, 99.95% SLA, EBA compliance, unlimited spaces, advanced admin

pricing.notes: Annual billing saves up to 17% vs monthly. Free tier hard-capped at 25 videos per person and 5 minutes per recording; unlimited meeting recording length is free. Business + AI is marked 'MOST POPULAR'. Loom is an Atlassian product as of 2024 acquisition.
